body:
We should add thinking UI, that shows last thinking paragraph with expand button when the model working, and we should show half of second to last paragraph and do gradient so it disappears, so it creates illusion of rotated scrolling or something. When expanded, we should should show dynamic human readable thinking. If AI asks any question to itself and doing request and so on, making decisions and so on. All smallest thinking steps should be naturalized in human readable form from meta language, so user is able to see how AI system thinks, what it does and so on.

By default it should be collapsed as thinking steps can be so fast, so they go thought at lightning speed. But if expanded, user should see exactly all reasoning steps (in human readable form).

How we do it, we translate each reasoning step into its description in meta language, after that we translate meta language to target user language.

While doing so we can rethink our architecture so exactly all tasks produce such visible thinking. And we should split each thinking process to smallest possible thoughts, that should look like human thinking process. So some too small steps can be omitted. By default. Yet we should be able to configure granularity, when our dependencies produce steps at some level of thinking granularity we should be able to see inviditual steps of link assistant calculator dependency, on the other granularity level we should be able to see only general calculation step. So we can have recursively composite steps, and on minimum granularity we should show only the high level steps, that define general direction and describe big actions and processes.

Everything is recursive, is fractally defined in links meta language.

If something yet not fully defined, and our solutions are not yet fully general we should fix it. Instead of solving 1 specific task we should be able to solve exactly entire class of tasks, if we solve entire class of tasks we should solve class of classes. Our end goal is to fully implement the general universal problem solving algorithm for all tasks with first focus and priority to questions answering, coding tasks and general agentic tasks with the computer.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Deep thinking
